an7.60:1.1:
1
"Sattahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu nacirasseva āsavānaṁ khayā … pe … sacchikatvā upasampajja vihareyya. Katamehi sattahi?
an7.60:1.2:
Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saddho hoti, sīlavā hoti, bahussuto hoti, paṭisallīno hoti, āraddhavīriyo hoti, satimā hoti, paññavā hoti. Imehi kho, bhikkhave, sattahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu nacirasseva āsavānaṁ khayā … pe … sacchikatvā upasampajja vihareyyā"ti.
Sattamaṁ.
